dialogue.speaker: interviewer
dialogue.text: How have you been feeling lately?

dialogue.speaker: participant
dialogue.text: Not great. I've been feeling really down and I can't seem to enjoy anything anymore.

dialogue.speaker: participant
dialogue.text: Terrible. I wake up at 3am every night and can't get back to sleep.

dialogue.speaker: participant
dialogue.text: Pretty good actually. Work is going well and I've been exercising regularly.
